ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the trail is located */,
  "trail_name" TEXT /* Name of the trail */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the trail (e.g., Easy, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "length_ft" INTEGER /* Length of the trail in feet */,
  "elevation_gain_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation gain of the trail in feet */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the trail information was last updated */,
  "width_ft" INTEGER /* Width of the trail in feet */,
  "steepness_percentage" INTEGER /* Steepness of the trail as a percentage */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain (e.g., groomed, powder, trees) */,
  "number_of_jumps" INTEGER /* Number of jumps or features on the trail */,
  "number_of_rails" INTEGER /* Number of rails or other park features */,
  "trail_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trail (e.g., Open, Closed, Groomed) */,
  "last_groomed_date" TEXT /* Date the trail was last groomed */,
  "trail_safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the trail */,
  "trail_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the trail (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifts" (
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lift */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the lift is located */,
  "lift_name" TEXT /* Name of the lift */,
  "lift_type" TEXT /* Type of the lift (e.g., Chairlift, Gondola) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lift in passengers */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the lift in minutes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the lift information was last updated */,
  "lift_speed_mph" REAL /* Speed of the lift in miles per hour */,
  "lift_capacity_per_hour" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lift in passengers per hour */,
  "lift_status" TEXT /* Current status of the lift (e.g., Operational, Under Maintenance) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last safety inspection */,
  "maintenance_scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "average_wait_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Average wait time for the lift */,
  "lift_safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the lift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snowfall" (
  "snowfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snowfall record */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the snowfall was recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the snowfall */,
  "snowfall_in" INTEGER /* Amount of snowfall in inches */,
  "snow_density" REAL /* Density of the snow in kg/m³ */,
  "snow_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the snow (e.g., Powder, Pack, Ice) */,
  "snowfall_source" TEXT /* Source of the snow (e.g., Natural, Artificial) */,
  "snowfall_duration_hours" REAL /* Duration of the snowfall in hours */,
  "average_temperature_f" REAL /* Average temperature during the snowfall in Fahrenheit */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed during the snowfall in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the snowfall */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snowfall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the employee works */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., Manager, Lift Operator, Ski Instructor) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the employee information was last updated */,
  "employee_address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "employee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "employee_education" TEXT /* Education level of the employee */,
  "employee_experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the ski industry */,
  "employee_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization or expertise of the employee */,
  "employee_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the employee */,
  "employee_performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  "employee_salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "employee_benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided to the employee */,
  "employee_safety_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last safety training */,
  "employee_first_aid_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last first aid training */,
  "employee_next_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the next performance evaluation */,
  "employee_next_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the next training session */,
  "employee_photo" TEXT /* Photo of the employee for identification purposes */,
  "employee_emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "employee_emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)
